lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (documented in LEARNINGS.md as acceptable)

notes: All acceptance criteria met. Migration 023 creates tool_sections table (workspace-scoped, RLS via can_access_workspace, update_updated_at trigger, workspace_id index) and ALTERs tools table to add position_x/position_y NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 and status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' CHECK (active|considering|cancelled). ToolStatus type and ToolSection interface added to database.ts; Tool interface updated with position_x, position_y, status. tool-sections GET+POST route follows tools/route.ts pattern; [id] PATCH+DELETE route follows sections/[id]/route.ts pattern with PGRST116 detection returning 404. tools API routes updated: POST accepts position_x, position_y, status; PATCH EDITABLE_FIELDS extended with position_x, position_y, status (with status validation). Client wrappers added: fetchToolSections, createToolSection, updateToolSection, deleteToolSection. createTool and updateTool signatures extended for new Tool fields.
